summary: Tested 2 bug fixes: (1) Tooltip in MapCanvas.jsx - hoveredZone.id !== selectedZoneId condition; (2) Fresh fetch on session re-open in DailySessionsPage.jsx; (3) Backend PUT /api/admin/zone-categories/{id} with nullable pattern fields. All 7 backend tests PASSED, all 4 frontend tooltip tests PASSED.

backend_nullable_fields.test_put_with_pattern_type_null: PASS - fill_type=solid + pattern_type=null correctly saved null
backend_nullable_fields.test_null_persists_in_db: PASS - GET after PUT confirms null persisted in DB
backend_nullable_fields.test_public_zone_categories: PASS - GET without auth returns active categories, no _id in response
backend_nullable_fields.test_zone_style_propagation: PASS - Category color change propagates to map_sessions zones

frontend_tooltip_tests.test1_tooltip_appears_on_non_selected_zo: PASS - data-testid='zone-hover-tooltip' visible when hovering non-selected zone
frontend_tooltip_tests.test2_floating_toolbar_on_selected_zone: PASS - FloatingToolbar with 4 buttons appears when zone is clicked
frontend_tooltip_tests.test3_no_tooltip_on_selected_zone: PASS - Tooltip element NOT in DOM when hovering over selected zone
frontend_tooltip_tests.test4_session_loads_correctly: PASS - 60 zones loaded, 'جولة الأربعاء 4 مارس 2026' session verified

fresh_fetch_verification.code_review: DailySessionsPage.jsx line 642: onSelectSession uses async axios.get(`${API}/map-sessions/${s.id}`) instead of setActiveSession(s)
fresh_fetch_verification.runtime_test: Map still loads correctly after session circle re-click (session ID: 9555d21a-da4a-4ffb-877f-e6e279a748f9)

js_errors.note: Only Cloudflare cdn-cgi/rum CDN monitoring requests failed (not app-related)

code_review_confirms.tooltip_condition: MapCanvas.jsx line 413: hoveredZone.id !== selectedZoneId - CORRECT. Tooltip suppressed for selected zone
code_review_confirms.onMouseEnter_check: MapCanvas.jsx line 296: onMouseEnter checks !isSelected before calling setHoveredZone - double protection
code_review_confirms.nullable_fields: settings.py lines 311-318: NULLABLE_FIELDS = {pattern_type, pattern_fg_color, pattern_bg_color} allows null values in PUT
code_review_confirms.fresh_fetch_logic: DailySessionsPage.jsx lines 642-649: async axios.get call always fetches fresh data from API

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: ZoneCategoryUpdate model_dump() returns None for ALL optional unset fields. NULLABLE_FIELDS logic will always clear pattern_type/pattern_fg_color/pattern_bg_color on ANY update - even if you only change 'color'. This is likely intentional (frontend always sends all fields), but worth noting.

MINOR: handlePointerMove (line 201) sets hoveredZone to selected zone via setHoveredZone, but tooltip render condition (hoveredZone.id !== selectedZoneId) prevents tooltip from showing - consistent behavior.
seed_data_creation: Used existing March 4, 2026 session (ID: 9555d21a-da4a-4ffb-877f-e6e279a748f9, 60 zones, طابق البدروم)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified: (1) Tooltip in /daily-sessions map correctly shows on non-selected zones and hides on selected zone. data-testid='zone-hover-tooltip' confirmed working. (2) onSelectSession in DailySessionsPage.jsx always fetches fresh API data. (3) Backend PUT /api/admin/zone-categories/{id} with pattern_type=null correctly saves null in DB and propagates style changes to all sessions. Test session: March 4, 2026 'جولة الأربعاء' at البدروم floor - 60 zones.
